eip_threads.title: PeerDAS - Peer Data Availability Sampling

thread.summary: EIP status update needed; action item assigned to update final status post-Fusaka activation.

eip_threads.current_state: Successfully deployed to mainnet as part of Fusaka; status documentation needs updating.

eip_threads.title: Forward compatible consensus data structures

thread.summary: CFI'd with CL team support; to be developed with option to remove if complexity issues arise.
Implementation progress: Nimbus, Lighthouse, and Lodestar ready; other clients in progress.

eip_threads.current_state: CFI'd for Glamsterdam with multiple clients having completed implementations; developing with flexibility to remove if needed.
open_questions: Whether complexity issues will emerge during integration

eip_threads.title: Enshrined Proposer-Builder Separation

thread.summary: Trustless payments kept in ePBS with no security issues found; exploring non-validating staked builders to address deposit churn concerns.
Non-validator builders PR merged; deposit bugs being fixed.
DevNet0 spec frozen at v1.7.0-alpha.1; DevNet1 targeting alpha.2 with two open PRs; end of February deadline set for DevNet0 launch; partial slot proofs identified as required dependency.

DevNet0 targeted for end of February by multiple clients; v1.7.0-alpha.2 released moving blob KZG commitments to bid structure; Lido found deposit bug requiring fix PR 4897; fork-choice complexity with OptimisticSync warning issued.
DevNet0 progressing with Lighthouse, Teku, and Prysm nearing readiness; target remains end of February with 2-3 clients.

eip_threads.current_state: DevNet0 launch targeted for end of February 2026 with multiple clients (Lighthouse, Teku, Prysm) nearing readiness; spec frozen at v1.7.0-alpha.2 with deposit bug fix merged.
open_questions: Fork-choice complexity with OptimisticSync and invalid branch removal
Variable PTC deadline specification still under discussion

eip_threads.title: Fork-choice enforced Inclusion Lists (FOCIL)

thread.summary: DFI'd for Glamsterdam, CFI'd for Heka; headliner process to start in January.
Proposed as Hegotá headliner with 8/11 clients having prototypes; broad consensus on prioritizing censorship resistance for Hegotá.
Selected as Hegotá headliner; rebased onto Gloas in consensus-specs PR 4931; to be renamed to Heze after merge.

eip_threads.current_state: Selected as Hegotá headliner with 8/11 clients having prototypes; consensus-specs PR 4931 in review for merge.
